case_title: D 3 PRODUCTIONS INC. VS NORTH AMERICA CARPET & DRAPERY CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,120.00 FILED BY D 3 PRODUCTIONS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICA CARPET & DRAPERY CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
